title: Daanbantayan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Daanbantayan with a Z-Score of +4.29. This critical event has reached a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Daanbantayan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 58%, and the wind speed is 6.5 km/h, which is not providing much relief. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, but the high CDD is a concern.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
